title: Model Interpretability Path
description: Build fluency in Model Interpretability inside Explainable AI (XAI) by moving from foundational terms into adjacent methods, variants, and extensions.

steps.title: Local Interpretable Model-agnostic Explanations (LIME)
steps.summary: A technique used to explain the predictions of machine learning models. It sits inside Explainable AI (XAI) / Model Interpretability. Start after LIME.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: SHAP Values
steps.summary: SHAP Values belongs to the Explainable AI (XAI) area of AI/ML, within Model Interpretability. It sits inside Explainable AI (XAI) / Model Interpretability. Start after SHAP and Shap-E. It opens into SHAP Interaction Values and Boosted Trees with SHAP Values.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: Explainable AI (XAI)
steps.summary: Explainable AI (XAI) belongs to the Explainable AI (XAI) area of AI/ML, within Model Interpretability. It sits inside Explainable AI (XAI) / Model Interpretability. Start after Explainable AI and AI in Architecture.
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: SHAP
steps.summary: SHAP belongs to the Explainable AI (XAI) area of AI/ML, within Model Interpretability. It sits inside Explainable AI (XAI) / Model Interpretability. Compare it with Shap-E and SHAP Values. It opens into SHAP Values and SHAP Summary Plots.
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: LIME
steps.summary: LIME belongs to the Explainable AI (XAI) area of AI/ML, within Model Interpretability. It sits inside Explainable AI (XAI) / Model Interpretability. Compare it with Boosted Trees with LIME Explanations and Local Rule Explanations (LIME-like). It opens into Boosted Trees with LIME Explanations and Local Rule Explanations (LIME-like).
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: Shap-E
steps.summary: Shap-E belongs to the Explainable AI (XAI) area of AI/ML, within Model Interpretability. It sits inside Explainable AI (XAI) / Model Interpretability. Compare it with SHAP and SHAP Values. It opens into SHAP Values and SHAP Summary Plots.
steps.whyIncluded: Treat this as an advanced extension once the earlier terms feel natural.

steps.title: Explainable AI
steps.summary: Explainable AI belongs to the Explainable AI (XAI) area of AI/ML, within Model Interpretability. It sits inside Explainable AI (XAI) / Model Interpretability. Start after AI in Architecture and AI and Architecture. It opens into Explainable AI (XAI).
steps.whyIncluded: Treat this as an advanced extension once the earlier terms feel natural.

steps.title: SHAP Deep Explainer
steps.summary: SHAP Deep Explainer belongs to the Explainable AI (XAI) area of AI/ML, within Model Interpretability. It sits inside Explainable AI (XAI) / Model Interpretability. Start after SHAP and Shap-E.
steps.whyIncluded: Treat this as an advanced extension once the earlier terms feel natural.
